task: Address remaining PR #2009 review comments on TASK-011 status and episode metrics consistency

decisions.summary: Applied minimal metadata-only fixes requested by unresolved reviewer threads: mark TASK-011 done and correct episode metrics to avoid contradictory session telemetry.

events.content: Verified unresolved review comments and confirmed two actionable items remained.
Updated TASK-011 frontmatter status to done and updated date to 2026-05-13.
Updated episode metrics to non-zero values aligned with completed session activity.
Validated changed files with json.tool and validate_session_json.py.
Post-push validation flagged episode-1834 extractor fallback output as inconsistent; hand-corrected episode metadata to match this session's successful outcome and real file/commit activity.

lessons: Episode files generated from JSON session logs still need manual verification because the extractor can misclassify evidence lines as errors and zero out metrics.
